'''galata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oath|oath]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oath|oath]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| galata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælætæth|gælætæth]] || [[word:gælætæj|gælætæj]] || [[word:gælætæsh|gælætæsh]] || [[word:gælætæ|gælætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:galalatath|galalatath]] || [[word:galalataj|galalataj]] || [[word:galalatash|galalatash]] || [[word:galalata|galalata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:galatath|galatath]] || [[word:galataj|galataj]] || [[word:galatash|galatash]] || [[word:galata|galata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:galaftath|galaftath]] || [[word:galaftaj|galaftaj]] || [[word:galaftash|galaftash]] || [[word:galaftaf|galaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galatatha|galatatha]] || [[word:galataja|galataja]] || [[word:galatasha|galatasha]] || [[word:galataka|galataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galatath|galatath]] || [[word:galataj|galataj]] || [[word:galatash|galatash]] || [[word:galata|galata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galatathal|galatathal]] || [[word:galatajal|galatajal]] || [[word:galatashal|galatashal]] || [[word:galatakal|galatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galatathatha|galatathatha]] || [[word:galatajaja|galatajaja]] || [[word:galatashasha|galatashasha]] || [[word:galataka|galataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galatathan|galatathan]] || [[word:galatajan|galatajan]] || [[word:galatashan|galatashan]] || [[word:galatakan|galatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galatathaoro|galatathaoro]] || [[word:galatajaoro|galatajaoro]] || [[word:galatashaoro|galatashaoro]] || [[word:galatakaoro|galatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
